task_completion.description: Verify the MRHead volume is loaded into 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer application is open. The slice views (Red, Yellow, Green) display a brain MRI image. The Data module or Subject Hierarchy lists 'MRHead'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Save Data dialog is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog window titled 'Save Data' (or similar) is visible on top of the main Slicer interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the file format is set to compressed NIfTI (.nii.gz)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Save Data dialog, the row corresponding to 'MRHead' shows the file format/extension set to '.nii.gz' or 'NIfTI'.

task_completion.description: Verify the output filename and directory are set correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Save Data dialog, the filename is set to 'MRHead_converted.nii.gz' and the directory path ends in '/Exports/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the file was saved to the file system
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window is visible showing 'MRHead_converted.nii.gz' inside the 'Exports' folder, or the Slicer status bar indicates a successful save.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Slicer GUI Save Data dialog
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the 'Save Data' dialog box rather than typing commands into the Python Console or a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify no external terminal tools were used for conversion
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing commands like 'c3d', 'dcm2niix', or file system copy/rename commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual Slicer application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface elements (icons, slice views, menus) match the standard 3D Slicer GUI and are not text-based descriptions or mockups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input volume is 'MRHead' with dimensions 256x256x130. The expected output is a compressed NIfTI file named 'MRHead_converted.nii.gz' located in '~/Documents/SlicerData/Exports/'.
